lead.queueSubtitle: Clients waiting for you. The most urgent appear first — focus on them.
lead.slaCaption: Reply quickly to “Urgent” ones so you don't miss the opportunity.

tableHelp.id: Internal lead code. Use it for quick identification in notes or emails.
tableHelp.name: Full name declared by the client at first contact. Click the name to open the lead card.
tableHelp.source: Channel that brought the client to us (Meta Ads, OLX, Google, referral, website).
tableHelp.sla: Maximum recommended time to make contact. Urgent = 15 min, Qualified = 2 h, Warm = 24 h.
tableHelp.priority: How likely the lead becomes a deal. The system computes this automatically — you don't need to calculate anything.
tableHelp.status: Current stage: Urgent (call now), Qualified (schedule a viewing), Warm (nurture), Auto follow-up (system handles it).
tableHelp.zone: District / city preferred by the client.

filters.nurturingHelp: System sends automated messages. No action needed.

leadDetail.title: Lead details
leadDetail.gdprNote: Client accepted GDPR terms at first contact.
leadDetail.rematchBanner: Heads-up: the preferred property was updated — match recommendations have been refreshed. The existing deal stays active; only the alternative property list changed.
leadDetail.matchSubtitle: Properties that best fit this client's requirements.
leadDetail.assignModalDesc: Selected agent will receive an active task. Maximum 3 parallel tasks per agent. Action is recorded in the audit log.
leadDetail.toastRecomputeDesc: Latest interactions included (WhatsApp messages + property views).
leadDetail.toastAssignDesc: Task created. Agent notified by email and in-app.
leadDetail.engagementHelp: How active the client is: message replies, views, bookings.
leadDetail.winChanceHelp: Automatic estimate of how likely this lead will turn into a closed deal.

property.portfolioSubtitle: Published properties. Click any to see full details and photo/video gallery.
property.freshnessHelp: How long since the listing was published. New listings attract more clients.
property.stateRefreshDesc: Published 30-60 days ago. We recommend updating photos / price.
property.stateOldDesc: Listing older than 60 days. Urgent update recommended.
property.newFormSubtitle: Fill in the basics. You can add photos and video after saving.

detail.linkDesc: Send this link to interested clients.
detail.interestDesc: Clients who viewed or asked in the last 7 days.

form.essentialsDesc: Address, surface and price are mandatory to publish.
form.mediaDesc: Add at least 3 photos to boost client interest.
form.uploadPhotosHelp: JPG/PNG up to 5 MB each. Recommended: 8-12 photos.
form.uploadVideoHelp: YouTube/Vimeo link or MP4 up to 100 MB.
form.linkHelp: URL of the listing on your own site or portals (OLX, 999.md).
form.districtHelp: Used to match leads from the same area.
form.successInfo: After saving we'll check for leads searching similar properties and hand them off to the listing agent.

deal.title: Deal pipeline
deal.subtitle: Drag cards between columns to move a deal to the next stage. Each stage has its own colour so you can scan quickly.

stageDescriptions.discovery: First contact. You understand needs and budget.
stageDescriptions.qualified: Client is serious. Preparing a viewing.

healthHelp.healthy: Deal on schedule, no recent negative signals.
healthHelp.review: A few days without interaction. Schedule a follow-up.
healthHelp.risk: At risk of loss. Call the client within 24 h.

deal.legendSubtitle: The system grades each deal and tells you whether it needs attention.
deal.confirmDesc: Marks the deal as successfully closed and generates commission. Reverting requires manager approval.
deal.toastWonDesc: Commission generated. Your performance has been updated.
deal.dragHint: Drag the card to the next column

dashboard.subtitleNoUrgent: No urgent leads today. Focus on the qualified ones.
dashboard.subtitleWithUrgent: You have {hot} urgent leads today awaiting a quick reply.

blocks.tasksDesc: Max 3 tasks at once to keep your focus sharp.
blocks.tasksFull: All slots occupied. Finish a task to receive a new one.
blocks.tasksAvailable: {free} free slots — you can take new leads
blocks.urgentDesc: These clients expect a reply within 15 minutes.
blocks.todayDesc: Top-priority leads from your queue. Click for details.
blocks.suggestionsDesc: The system suggests the next step for each active lead. Click “+ Add to tasks” to put it on today's plan.
blocks.tasksTodayDesc: Today's to-do list. Mark a task done — your performance updates automatically.
blocks.perfDesc: How you're doing in the last 30 days.
blocks.perfApsHelp: How well you manage leads and deals.

tutorial.title: REVYX tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: How the app works, screen by screen. Recommended on first login.
tutorial.intro: REVYX helps you manage leads and deals quickly, without losing clients. You'll find simple explanations for each screen here. For inline details, tap the “i” icon next to any element.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: First screen after login. You see active tasks, urgent leads, and personal performance over the last 30 days. Hit “Open list” to start your day.

leads.title: Lead list
leads.body: All potential clients from Meta, Google, OLX, referrals and the website. The system sorts them automatically by priority: urgent first. Use the top filters to see only qualified or auto-followed leads.

leadDetail.title: Lead card
leadDetail.body: All client details: budget, preferred area, interaction history, property recommendations. From here you can refresh priority, send WhatsApp, or hand the lead to a colleague.

properties.title: Property portfolio
properties.body: All published properties. Click any to view photos, video and full specs. Use “+ Add property” to publish a new one.

deals.title: Deal pipeline
deals.body: Drag cards between columns to advance deals: Discovery → Qualified → Offer → Negotiation → Closing → Won. The stage colour helps you scan.

cabinet.title: Personal cabinet
cabinet.body: Your profile: stats, deal history, work score and preferences. Agency and group cabinets show the extended team (manager-only).

tutorialFuture.title: In the full version (MVP)
tutorialFuture.body: Besides this page we'll add step-by-step guides on each screen with key-button highlights. You'll be able to re-launch the tour from the “?” menu.

agent.title: My cabinet
agent.subtitle: Personal data, performance, preferences.
agent.outOfOfficeHelp: While unavailable you won't receive new leads.
agent.calendarSyncHelp: Connect Google Calendar so booking conflicts are detected automatically.

agency.title: My agency
agency.subtitle: Agency data, active team, global KPIs.

group.title: My group
group.subtitle: The team you belong to. The manager sees all members.
group.shareHelp: Your share of total closed deals across the group.

manager.title: Manager dashboard
manager.subtitle: Agent performance, active escalations, override rights.
manager.escalationsSubtitle: Leads past the recommended reply window — manager intervention required.

admin.title: Tenants admin
admin.subtitle: User permissions and organisations. Access for manager / admin only.

login.demoNotice: Demo · M0 walkthrough · click “Continue” to enter the dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Organisation config — language, notifications, WhatsApp integration.
settings.saveOk: Settings saved (demo — not persisted in the preview build).

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Personal stats, performance history, active tasks.

notifications.title: Notification feed
notifications.subtitle: All important events: escalations, new recommendations, won deals.

task.title: My plan
task.subtitle: All your tasks: ones the system suggests per lead and ones you add manually.
task.emptyToday: No tasks for today. Check the dashboard suggestions.
task.emptyAll: No tasks. Hit “+ Add task” or accept a suggestion from the dashboard.

typeHelp.first_contact: First call or message to a new client. The faster the better.
typeHelp.follow_up: Touch-base message when a client has gone silent for a few days.
typeHelp.schedule_showing: Set up date and time for a property viewing.
typeHelp.send_property: Send the client a list of properties that match their criteria.
typeHelp.request_documents: Ask for ID and proof of budget so you can move forward.
typeHelp.draft_offer: Write up the offer based on the verbal agreement.
typeHelp.close_deal: Confirm the notary booking and final steps.
typeHelp.review_no_show: Find out why the client didn't show up for the viewing.
typeHelp.custom: Personal task — not factored into the auto priority.

modal.title: Add new task
modal.description: Your task lands on today's plan. Active ones (max 3 at a time) are the ones you're working on right now.
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Call Maria Popescu to confirm viewing
modal.maxRule: Max 3 active tasks at once. The rest wait for a free slot.
modal.errorLabel: Add a description for the task.

suggestion.intro: The system suggests next steps for this lead. Accept them to put them on your plan.

toast.maxActiveDesc: Finish one active task before starting this one.

leadExtras.notesDesc: Agent's personal notes — visible only to you and the manager. Use for context that doesn't fit standard fields.
leadExtras.notePlaceholder: e.g. Client prefers upper floors, wants east-facing balcony, has 2 kids.
leadExtras.notesEmpty: No notes yet. Add one to keep useful context.
leadExtras.documentsDesc: Attach the service contract, cadastral acts, ID copy and other relevant docs.
leadExtras.documentSavedToast: Document attached. Will be encrypted and retained per GDPR policy.
leadExtras.documentsEmpty: No documents attached. Hit “+ Attach document” to upload the first one.

documentModal.title: Attach new document
documentModal.warning: Real files will be uploaded and encrypted in the final version. We're only simulating here.

agent.bioPlaceholder: Real-estate agent with 5+ years in Centru and Botanica. Specialty: apartments and new houses.
agent.specialtyHelp: Areas and property types where you have the most expertise.
agent.ratingHelp: Average score from clients after deals closed in the last 12 months.
agent.lifetimeHelp: Total deals closed since joining the platform.

agency.introBody: The agency cabinet shows the organisation as a whole: legal info, the full agent roster, global performance and aggregate KPIs. Useful for clients who want to know the company before working with you.

group.introBody: A group bundles several agents under a common manager (e.g. “Centru-Botanica Team”). You see the colleagues you work with day-to-day, the internal leaderboard and your share of group results.
